name: MEDIOEVO Agent Ops Pack
description:
Templates and checklists for shipping agent-built work with evidence, boundaries and public-safe release discipline.

MEDIOEVO Tools is working toward a local-first OS for personal AIs: portable continuity across devices, shared displays, skill packets and future hardware interfaces. The public plan is here:
https://medioevo.space/blog/medioevo-tools-plan-maestro.html

This pack is the practical first layer: fichas, gates and release discipline before any agent touches GitHub, Gumroad, a website, social accounts, files or customer-facing actions.

What you get:
- Technical card template for agent/product intake
- Curator report template for messy folders and source material
- ActionGate checklist before push, deploy, Gumroad, social posting or deletion
- GitHub release checklist for public-safe repositories
- Gumroad listing template with includes/excludes sections
- Synthetic audit example
- Support notes for using the pack without exposing private IP

What this does not include:
- Private Claudio runtime or orchestration
- Private prompts, browser sessions, credentials or account access
- MEDIOEVO RPG/TCG source, assets, lore or bridge code
- Full unpublished books or canon vaults
- Customer data, private consulting deliverables or guaranteed outcomes
- A guarantee of autonomous AI safety, hardware delivery or a one-year product timeline

Buyer-safe boundary:
This pack helps you slow down risky publication and leave evidence. It does not guarantee agent safety, remove hallucinations, replace human review or provide the future MEDIOEVO OS itself.
excludes: MEDIOEVO RPG/TCG source, assets, lore or bridge code
full unpublished books or canon vaults
guaranteed autonomous AI safety or revenue outcomes
refund_note: Digital template pack. Refunds follow the store policy when the file cannot be accessed or materially differs from the listing.
